ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline (e.g., Indigo: 6E) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for customer support */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the route */,
  "source_airport" TEXT /* Source airport of the route */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Destination airport of the route */,
  "distance_km" INTEGER /* Distance in kilometers between the source and destination airports */,
  "frequency_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of flights per week on this route */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (domestic, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the flight belongs to */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Number of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in hours */,
  "duration_mins" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "total_stops" INTEGER /* Total stops in the flight */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the flight */,
  "airplane_model" TEXT /* Model of the airplane used for the flight */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the flight can accommodate */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Types of cabin classes available (e.g., economy, business, first class) */,
  "in_flight_amenities" TEXT /* Description of in-flight amenities (e.g., Wi-Fi, meals, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the schedule belongs to */,
  "journey_day" INTEGER /* Day of the journey */,
  "journey_month" INTEGER /* Month of the journey */,
  "departure_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of departure */,
  "departure_minute" INTEGER /* Minute of departure */,
  "arrival_day" INTEGER /* Day of the arrival */,
  "arrival_month" INTEGER /* Month of the arrival */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., New Delhi: DEL) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, administrator, airline) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program membership (e.g., frequent flyer miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the booking */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "passenger_age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "passenger_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "baggage_allowance" TEXT /* Baggage allowance for the passenger */,
  "meal_preference" TEXT /* Meal preference for the passenger (e.g., vegetarian, non-vegetarian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the flight by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user recommends the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_ratings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the airline by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user recommends the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airline_ratings_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airline_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
